markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The audience focus is now 100% on the API business, reversing a recent shift to a 50/50 split.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)
  - [**Strategy Refinement:** The 5 proposed content clusters will be updated to address key feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Separate API vs. End-to-End content.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
      - [Add a 6th cluster for "Vertical Indexes."](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Focus on business value over pure tech explanations.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [**Competitive Analysis:** The competitor list will be refined to separate API-first players (e.g., Exa, Tavily) from consumer-focused giants (e.g., Perplexity), preventing skewed data.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** GrowthX will begin keyword research, present 40–50 topic ideas next week, and target a 5-article/week publishing cadence by mid-sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot: API-First Focus

  - [The audience focus has shifted back to 100% API business.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)
  - [This reverses a recent pivot to a 50/50 split between API and end-to-end solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [The strategy will be updated immediately to reflect this change.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)

### Content Strategy Refinements

  - [The 5 proposed content clusters will be updated based on feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**API vs. End-to-End Separation:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The API and end-to-end businesses have distinct key verticals (e.g., retail for end-to-end), requiring separate content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
      - [**Action:** Split clusters by business line or add a tracking column to the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [**New Cluster: Vertical Indexes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This product is central to the website's homepage and future roadmap, requiring dedicated content support.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**Action:** Add a 6th cluster for "Vertical Indexes."](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Content Angle: Business Value over Tech:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Past content on topics like RAG showed that business-value-focused pieces perform better than purely technical explanations.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**Action:** Prioritize business impact and value creation in content.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [**SME Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX can interview You.com SMEs for quotes and content guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [**Action:** Identify SME-driven topics early to schedule interviews without delaying production.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)

### Competitive Analysis Refinement

  - [The competitor list will be refined to prevent skewed data from consumer-focused giants.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Action:** Separate competitors into two buckets:](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
    1.  [**Search Infrastructure API:** Exa, Tavily, Brave.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
    2.  [**End-to-End Solutions:** Writer, Hebbia (list to be provided by Ben).](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Action:** Exclude consumer products from analysis (e.g., Perplexity's API vs. its consumer app).](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### Onboarding & Production Plan

  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
      - [**This Week:** GrowthX updates strategy doc.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
      - [**Next Week:** GrowthX presents 40–50 topic ideas for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Publish 1 article to calibrate voice/tone.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
      - [**Week 2:** Publish 3 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
      - [**Week 3+:** Target 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
      - [**CMS Access:** Grant `pod0@growthx.ai` blog-level access in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Airtable will track production; drafts shared via Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2398.0)
      - [**Performance:** A Looker dashboard will track Google Search Console & GA4 data, including LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### LLM Visibility Monitoring

  - [GrowthX is using **Scrunch** to monitor LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [**Initial Data (since Oct 16):** 1% citation rate vs. competitor average of 3%.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [**Action:** Connect GrowthX with **Brandlight**, You.com's other LLM visibility platform, to align on data and prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [Update content strategy doc with feedback (API-first, new cluster, business value focus).](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [Refine competitor list based on You.com's input.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research and prepare 40–50 topic ideas for next week's call.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [Set up the Looker performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [**You.com:**](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
      - [Grant Webflow access to `pod0@growthx.ai`.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
      - [Share the internal editorial calendar with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
      - [Connect GrowthX with the Brandlight team.](https://fathom.video/share/Qd_PhaaPBzeF7vSrfBX1qYb5J-F8Fy4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
